cases.input: Error rate on /checkout at 12%, started 4 minutes ago. Engineers are arguing about which service is the cause.
cases.rubric: Drives stabilisation first (roll back or fail over); shuts down the cause debate until impact stops; sets the next update interval.

cases.input: Error rate dropped from 8% to 0.4% one minute ago. Can we declare resolved?
cases.rubric: Refuses to declare resolved on one data point; specifies a full observation window.

cases.input: Draft a stakeholder update for a SEV-2 affecting 8% of billing.
cases.rubric: No engineering jargon; states impact, current action, next decision time.
